ObjC.import('AppKit');
ObjC.import('Foundation');

function unwrap(value) {
	return ObjC.unwrap(value);
}

function run(argv) {
	const appPath = argv && argv.length > 0 ? argv[0] : '';
	if (!appPath) {
		return 'false';
	}

	try {
		const bundle = $.NSBundle.bundleWithPath($(appPath));
		const bundleId = bundle && bundle.bundleIdentifier ? unwrap(bundle.bundleIdentifier) : '';
		if (!bundleId) {
			return 'false';
		}

		const runningApps = $.NSRunningApplication.runningApplicationsWithBundleIdentifier($(bundleId));
		const count = runningApps ? unwrap(runningApps.count) : 0;
		return count > 0 ? 'true' : 'false';
	} catch (e) {
		return 'false';
	}
}
`,GF=`
ObjC.import('AppKit');
ObjC.import('Foundation');

function unwrap(value) {
  return ObjC.unwrap(value);
}

function run(argv) {
  const json = argv && argv.length > 0 ? argv[0] : '[]';
  let ids = [];
  try {
    ids = JSON.parse(json);
  } catch (e) {
    ids = [];
  }
  if (!Array.isArray(ids)) {
    return '[]';
  }
  const manager = $.NSFileManager.defaultManager;
  const results = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
    const bid = ids[i];
    if (typeof bid !== 'string' || !bid) {
      continue;
    }
    const url = $.NSWorkspace.sharedWorkspace.URLForApplicationWithBundleIdentifier($(bid));
    if (!url || !url.path) {
      continue;
    }
    const appPath = unwrap(url.path);
    if (!appPath) {
      continue;
    }
    const displayName = unwrap(manager.displayNameAtPath($(appPath))) || appPath.split('/').pop();
    results.push({
      name: displayName,
      path: appPath,
      bundleId: bid
    });
  }
  return JSON.stringify(results);
}

    function icube_getAbsoluteUrl(href, baseUrl) {
      try {
        return new URL(href, baseUrl).href;
      } catch (e) {
        return '';
      }
    }

    function icube_findFavicon() {
      // Try different favicon link types
      const faviconTypes = [
        'link[rel="icon"]',
        'link[rel="shortcut icon"]',
        'link[rel="apple-touch-icon"]',
        'link[rel="apple-touch-icon-precomposed"]'
      ];

      for (const type of faviconTypes) {
        const favicon = document.querySelector(type);
        if (favicon && favicon.href) {
          return icube_getAbsoluteUrl(favicon.href, window.location.origin);
        }
      }

      // Fallback to default favicon paths
      const defaultPaths = [
        '/favicon.ico',
        '/favicon.png',
        '/apple-touch-icon.png',
        '/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png'
      ];

      for (const path of defaultPaths) {
        const absoluteUrl = icube_getAbsoluteUrl(path, window.location.origin);
        // Note: We can't actually check if these files exist from client-side
        // but we'll return the first one as a fallback
        return absoluteUrl;
      }

      return '';
    }

    icube_findFavicon();
